scripts.resume:build: cd resume && rm -f samar_hayat_resume.{aux,log,out,pdf} && rm -f ../public/resume/samar_hayat_resume.pdf && xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode samar_hayat_resume.tex && mkdir -p ../public/resume && cp samar_hayat_resume.pdf ../public/resume/
scripts.resume:docker: docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/resume:/work" -v /usr/share/fonts/ubuntu:/usr/share/fonts/ubuntu:ro -w /work texlive/texlive:latest xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode samar_hayat_resume.tex && mkdir -p public/resume && cp resume/samar_hayat_resume.pdf public/resume/
